prompt: Review this Rust WebSocket handler code. It manages connections for a multi-agent gateway.

assertions.text: Identifies unsafe static mut CONNECTION_COUNT as a data race (UB in Rust)
Flags hardcoded secret key in WsState::new()
Identifies command injection via execute_command (passes raw input to sh -c)
Flags path traversal in load_config (user-controlled path appended to /etc/)
Identifies secret_key leaking in serialize_state output
Flags .unwrap() on send_to_user (panics if channel closed)
Notes that broadcast silently drops send errors (let _ = ...)
